languages.text: "Что за абсурд! Вы находитесь на моем флагмане и смеете…" {n}Механический голос вдруг обрывается. Себериан лихорадочно переводит взгляд с лиц экипажа на убранство мостика — и ничего не узнает. Схватившись за голову, он повторяет:{/n} "Это… это вздор! Этого не может быть..."

"Bu ne saçmalık? Benim sancak gemimdesin ve..." {n}Mekanik ses aniden kesiliyor. Seberian, hiçbir şeyi tanıyamadan gözlerini ateşli bir şekilde mürettebatın yüzlerinden köprünün mobilyalarına çeviriyor. Başını tutarak tekrarlıyor.{/n} "Bu... Çok saçma! Mümkün değil..."
languages.original_text: "What nonsense is this? You are aboard my flagship and you dare..." {n}The mechanical voice suddenly cuts off. Seberian feverishly shifts his gaze from the faces of the crew to the furnishings of the bridge, recognising nothing. Clutching his head, he repeats,{/n} "This... this is absurd! This cannot be..."

traits.locale_text: "Bu ne saçmalık? Benim sancak gemimdesin ve..." {n}Mekanik ses aniden kesiliyor. Seberian, hiçbir şeyi tanıyamadan gözlerini ateşli bir şekilde mürettebatın yüzlerinden köprünün mobilyalarına çeviriyor. Başını tutarak tekrarlıyor.{/n} "Bu... Çok saçma! Mümkün değil..."

languages.text: "Was soll dieser Unsinn? Ihr seid an Bord meines Flaggschiffs und wagt es ..." {n}Die mechanische Stimme verstummt. Seberians Blick schweift fieberhaft von den Gesichtern der Besatzung über die Brücke, ohne etwas zu erkennen. Er fasst sich an den Kopf und wiederholt:{/n} "Das ... das ist absurd! Das kann nicht sein ..."
languages.original_text: "What nonsense is this? You are aboard my flagship and you dare..." {n}The mechanical voice suddenly cuts off. Seberian feverishly shifts his gaze from the faces of the crew to the furnishings of the bridge, recognising nothing. Clutching his head, he repeats,{/n} "This... this is absurd! This cannot be..."

traits.locale_text: "Was soll dieser Unsinn? Ihr seid an Bord meines Flaggschiffs und wagt es ..." {n}Die mechanische Stimme verstummt. Seberians Blick schweift fieberhaft von den Gesichtern der Besatzung über die Brücke, ohne etwas zu erkennen. Er fasst sich an den Kopf und wiederholt:{/n} "Das ... das ist absurd! Das kann nicht sein ..."

languages.text: « Qu'est-ce que c'est que ces âneries ? Vous êtes à bord de mon vaisseau, et vous osez... » {n}La voix mécanique s'interrompt soudain. Le regard de Seberian se pose tour à tour sur le visage des membres de l'équipage et sur le mobilier, sans rien reconnaître. Se prenant la tête à deux mains, il répète en boucle :{/n} « C'est... c'est absurde ! Non, c'est impossible... »
languages.original_text: "What nonsense is this? You are aboard my flagship and you dare..." {n}The mechanical voice suddenly cuts off. Seberian feverishly shifts his gaze from the faces of the crew to the furnishings of the bridge, recognising nothing. Clutching his head, he repeats,{/n} "This... this is absurd! This cannot be..."

traits.locale_text: « Qu'est-ce que c'est que ces âneries ? Vous êtes à bord de mon vaisseau, et vous osez... » {n}La voix mécanique s'interrompt soudain. Le regard de Seberian se pose tour à tour sur le visage des membres de l'équipage et sur le mobilier, sans rien reconnaître. Se prenant la tête à deux mains, il répète en boucle :{/n} « C'est... c'est absurde ! Non, c'est impossible... »

languages.text: «¿Qué absurdo es este? Está a bordo de mi nave insignia y osa...». {n}La voz mecánica se interrumpe de pronto. Seberian pasa una mirada febril por los rostros de la tripulación y el equipamiento del puente sin reconocer nada. Se lleva las manos a la cabeza y repite:{/n} «¡Esto...! ¡Esto es absurdo! No es posible...».
languages.original_text: "What nonsense is this? You are aboard my flagship and you dare..." {n}The mechanical voice suddenly cuts off. Seberian feverishly shifts his gaze from the faces of the crew to the furnishings of the bridge, recognising nothing. Clutching his head, he repeats,{/n} "This... this is absurd! This cannot be..."

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué absurdo es este? Está a bordo de mi nave insignia y osa...». {n}La voz mecánica se interrumpe de pronto. Seberian pasa una mirada febril por los rostros de la tripulación y el equipamiento del puente sin reconocer nada. Se lleva las manos a la cabeza y repite:{/n} «¡Esto...! ¡Esto es absurdo! No es posible...».

languages.text: “这是什么胡话？你在我的旗舰上，竟还敢……”{n}机械化的嗓音突然中断。塞贝里安焦躁地来回扫视船员的面孔，又看向舰桥的陈设，却什么都认不出来。他抱住头，一遍遍重复着：{/n}“这……这太荒谬了！不可能……”
languages.original_text: "What nonsense is this? You are aboard my flagship and you dare..." {n}The mechanical voice suddenly cuts off. Seberian feverishly shifts his gaze from the faces of the crew to the furnishings of the bridge, recognising nothing. Clutching his head, he repeats,{/n} "This... this is absurd! This cannot be..."

traits.locale_text: “这是什么胡话？你在我的旗舰上，竟还敢……”{n}机械化的嗓音突然中断。塞贝里安焦躁地来回扫视船员的面孔，又看向舰桥的陈设，却什么都认不出来。他抱住头，一遍遍重复着：{/n}“这……这太荒谬了！不可能……”

languages.text: 「何を言っているんだ？旗艦に上がって、こんなことをするなんて…」{n}機械的な声が突然途絶える。シベリアは、船員たちの顔から船橋の家具へと視線を移し、何も認識できない。頭を掴みながら、彼は繰り返す.{/n}「これは…これはおかしい！ありえない…」
languages.original_text: "What nonsense is this? You are aboard my flagship and you dare..." {n}The mechanical voice suddenly cuts off. Seberian feverishly shifts his gaze from the faces of the crew to the furnishings of the bridge, recognising nothing. Clutching his head, he repeats,{/n} "This... this is absurd! This cannot be..."
